summary: AOSP TEE evidence policy for the protected-agent profile. Same TeeEvidencePolicy shape the agent's evaluateTeeEvidencePolicy consumes. CONFIDENTIALITY IS BLOCKED on the riscv64 Cuttlefish/qemu-virt bring-up track (no CoVE-capable KVM/crosvm, 16KB-page validation pending); this policy validates the management/export contract, not a confidential boot.

blockedClaims.memoryEncrypted: BLOCKED: riscv64 CoVE TVM memory confidentiality not available on bring-up host.
blockedClaims.ioProtected: BLOCKED: IOPMP source-ID policy not validated at 4KB+16KB page sizes.
blockedClaims.npuProtected: BLOCKED: measured NPU firmware + TSM monitor fold not available on bring-up host.
